perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long dark hair and a purple top is standing in what appears to be a hotel bathroom, looking directly at the camera and speaking. (2) She maintains a friendly facial expression, gesturing slightly with her hand toward her chest as she continues her story. (3) The scene remains static as she finishes her anecdote with a knowing smile toward the viewer.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) A female voice speaks in Mandarin with a clear, conversational, and slightly humorous tone. (2) There is no background music during the speech. (3) A short, high-pitched laugh sound effect (SFX) plays at the very end of the video as the punchline is delivered.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: '那天我去相親' (That day I went on a blind date) - Narrative tone. (2) Functional Text: '相親對象人還怪好的嘞' (The blind date partner was quite nice) - Positive tone. (3) Functional Text: '他問我錢夠不夠用' (He asked if I have enough money) - Narrative tone. (4) Functional Text: '不夠的話跟他說' (If not, tell him) - Supportive tone. (5) Functional Text: '他教我省' (He'll teach me how to save) - Humorous/Punchline tone.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator speaking to the camera.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman with long, straight black hair, wearing heavy eye makeup and a light purple long-sleeved shirt with a draped neckline.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: An indoor bathroom or hotel suite featuring a white built-in bathtub, wooden wall panels, and bright lighting reflected in a mirror.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To entertain the audience with a humorous short story about a blind date. The content relies on a subverted expectation where a seemingly generous offer ('tell me if you don't have enough money') turns into a joke about being stingy ('I'll teach you how to save').

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Direct eye contact with camera, relatable dating humor.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video follows a standard 'short joke' format common on platforms like Douyin/TikTok, utilizing text overlays to ensure the punchline is clear.
